title: Comparing Packet Delivery: Connection-Oriented vs. Connectionless
description: A flowchart comparing the multi-step handshake and guaranteed delivery of connection-oriented protocols (like TCP) with the simple, single-step send-and-forget nature of connectionless protocols (like UDP).
relationships: Sender initiates a three-way handshake with Receiver
Receiver acknowledges each received data packet
Sender and Receiver terminate the connection
Contrasting path shows Sender immediately sending a data packet without setup or acknowledgement
